---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# Expectations
```{r setup-behsigsoc, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, results = 'markup', warning = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(viridis)
library(ggdist)
library(ggridges)

library(rstan)
library(tidybayes)
library(bayesplot)
library(randtoolbox)

# Source functions
setwd("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/rlforaging")
function.list = paste0("social/code/functions/", list.files("social/code/functions"))
function.list = function.list[sapply(function.list, function(x) !grepl("2", x))]
sapply(function.list, source, .GlobalEnv)

```
```{r, directories-behsigsoc, include=FALSE}
if(!dir.exists("social/results")){dir.create("social/results")}
if(!dir.exists("social/results/expectations")){dir.create("social/results/expectations")}
```


## Experimental data structure
```{r, expect-experiment, echo = T, results='markup'}
# Number of simulated experiments
nsim = 15

# Experimental parameters (identical for all simulations)
exp.pars = list(
  sessions = 18,
  trials = 12,
  nplayers = 5, # number of players per session
  durations.vec = c(75, 90, 105)  # The simulation functions sample trial lengths from this vector (equally) 
                                  # and randomly assigns them to the different environments
)
# Add unique ids for players (rows are sessions)
exp.pars$id = with(exp.pars, matrix(1:(sessions*nplayers), ncol=nplayers, byrow = T))

# Environmental parameters (identical for all simulations)
max = round(c(.5, .7, .9), digits = 2)
ratio = round(c(.5, .65, .8, .95), digits = 2)
env.pars = expand.grid(max=max, ratio=ratio)
env.pars = list(max=env.pars$max, ratio=env.pars$ratio)

```

## Models with 1 social learning parameter (dbn, vsn, dbr, vsr)
```{r, expect-1alpha-rlpars, echo=TRUE}
# Get model list
models = getmodels()

# Drop versions with adaptive social learning weights
# models=lapply(models,function(x) x[!grepl(pattern = "2", models$name)] )

# Select models with single social learning parameter (and arl model)
models=lapply(models,function(x) x[models$name %in% c("arl.fixed", "dbn1.fixed", "vsn1.fixed", "dbr1.fixed", "vsr1.fixed")] )

# Load ARL model fit
fit = readRDS("asocial/results/modelcomp/m4.1.fit.rds")

# Get ARL parameter estimates
draws = fit %>%
  tidy_draws() %>%
  select(names(models$free.pars.pop[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]]))
arl.pars = apply(draws, 2, mean)

# Remove fit
remove(fit)

# Set social learning weights for decision- and reward- based DB and VS 
srl.pars = c("alphaDBD", "alphaVSD", "alphaDBR", "alphaVSR") 
srl.pars = sapply(srl.pars, function(x) seq(0, 1, by = .01)) %>%
  `colnames<-`(srl.pars)

# Merge
rl.pars = models$fixed.par[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]] %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  cbind(t(arl.pars)) %>% cbind(srl.pars)
```


```{r, expect-1alpha-compute, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results='markup'}
log.txt = "social/results/expectations/log_1par.txt"
if(!file.exists(log.txt)){file.create(log.txt)}

# Add caching
if(!file.exists(paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))){
  
  sink(log.txt, append = T)

  # Results list
  results = list(
    rew.acc = list(),
    acc.time = list(),
    switches = list(), switches.time = list()
  )
  
  for(mod in 1:length(models$name)){

    # Get function
    f = get(models$sim[[mod]])
    
    for(parcomb in 1:nrow(rl.pars)){

      # Get rl.pars and add to sim pars
      sim.pars = c(exp.pars, env.pars, rl.pars[parcomb, ])
      
      
      # Loop over number of simulations
      for(sim in 1:nsim){
        
        if(exists("end.time")){
          print(paste("This took:", (end.time - start.time), "seconds" ))
        }
        start.time = Sys.time()
        
        prgrss = paste("Simulating from model", models$name[[mod]], 
                       ". Parameter combination", parcomb, 
                       ", simulation ", sim)
        print(prgrss)
        
        # Simulate data
        sim.data = f(sim.parameters = sim.pars)
        
        # Add sim parameters
        sim.data = sim.data %>%
          mutate(decision = decision - 1) %>%
          cbind(model=models$name[[mod]], parcomb=parcomb) %>%
          bind_cols(rl.pars[parcomb, ]) %>%
          mutate(alphaS = alphaDBD) %>%
          mutate(sim = sim) %>%
          relocate(model, parcomb, sim)
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy and rewards
        rew.acc = sim.data %>%
          # Compute individual accuracy and rewards on each trial 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>% # for each individual trial
          reframe(acc = sum(decision), 
                  rew = sum(reward)) %>%
          mutate(acc = acc / (duration + 1)) %>%
          mutate(rew = rew / (duration + 1)) %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, ratio, max) %>% 
          reframe(acc.mean = mean(acc), rew.mean = mean(rew)) 
        
        # Save
        results$rew.acc = append(results$rew.acc, list(rew.acc))
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy ~ time
        acc.time = sim.data %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy at each time step
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(frac.corr = mean(decision)) 
        
        # Save
        results$acc.time = append(results$acc.time, list(acc.time))
        
        # Compute mean switch rate
        switches = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switches = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          reframe(switches = sum(switches, na.rm=T) / duration) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switches.mean = mean(switches)) 
        
        # Save
        results$switches = append(results$switches, list(switches))
        
        # Compute mean switches ~ time
        switches.time = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switch = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sim, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switch.frac = sum(switch, na.rm = T) / max(player)) 
        
         # Save
        results$switches.time = append(results$switches.time, list(switches.time))
        
        # End time
        end.time = Sys.time()
        
      }
      
    }
  }
  
  results = lapply(results, function(x) bind_rows(x))
  saveRDS(results, file = 
            paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))
  
  sink()
  
}else{
  results = readRDS(file = paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_1par.rds", sep = "/"))
}


```

### Plot
```{r, expect-1alpha-plot, echo=TRUE}

# List to save plots to
plot.list = list()
    
# Facet labels
max.labs = paste("Maximum Yield", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max)))
names(max.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max))

ratio.labs = paste("Yield Ratio", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio)))
names(ratio.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio))

facet.labeller = labeller(ratio=ratio.labs, max=max.labs)
    
# Individual Accuracy
plot.data = results$rew.acc %>%
  # Summarise sampling distribution
  group_by(model, alphaS, ratio, max) %>%
  reframe(ind.acc.mean= mean(acc.mean),
          ind.acc.lower = quantile(acc.mean, probs = .025),
          ind.acc.upper = quantile(acc.mean, probs = .975))

plot.data = results$rew.acc %>%
      group_by(sim, model, ratio, max) %>%
      mutate(acc.delta = acc.mean - acc.mean[which(alphaS == 0)]) %>%
      # Summarise sampling distribution
      group_by(model, alphaS, ratio, max) %>%
      reframe(acc.delta.mean= mean(acc.delta),
              acc.delta.lower = quantile(acc.delta, probs = .025),
              acc.delta.upper = quantile(acc.delta, probs = .975))

# Decision-based DB vs. VS
p = plot.data %>% filter(model %in% c("dbn1.fixed", "vsn1.fixed")) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x=alphaS, fill=as.factor(model))) + 
      labs(y="Individual Accuracy \n") +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-0.5, 1, by=.1))+
      scale_x_continuous(name=bquote(paste("\n ", alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn])), breaks = seq(0, 1, by=.1))+
      scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T, begin = .1, end = .8, 
                         name="Model", labels=c("DBn", "VSn")) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, lty=2)+
      geom_pointrange(aes(y=acc.delta.mean, ymin=acc.delta.lower, ymax=acc.delta.upper), shape=21, size=1, lwd=1) +
      theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
            strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
            axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
            legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
            plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
      facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p
#plot.list =  append(plot.list, list(p))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/acc_dbn_vsn.jpeg")

# Reward-based DB vs. VS
p = plot.data %>% filter(model %in% c("dbr1.fixed", "vsr1.fixed")) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x=alphaS, fill=as.factor(model))) + 
      labs(y="Individual Accuracy \n") +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-0.5, 1, by=.1))+
      scale_x_continuous(name=bquote(paste("\n ", alpha[DBr], " / ", alpha[VSr])), breaks = seq(0, 1, by=.1))+
      scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T, begin = .1, end = .8, 
                         name="Model", labels=c("DBr", "VSr")) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, lty=2)+
      geom_pointrange(aes(y=acc.delta.mean, ymin=acc.delta.lower, ymax=acc.delta.upper), shape=21, size=1, lwd=1) +
      theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
            strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
            axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
            legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
            plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
      facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p
#plot.list =  append(plot.list, list(p))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/acc_dbr_vsr.jpeg")

# Individual Accuracy over time
plot.data = results$acc.time %>%
  group_by(model, alphaS, ratio, max, time) %>%
  reframe(frac.corr.mean = mean(frac.corr)) %>%
  group_by(model, ratio, max, time) %>%
  mutate(delta.mean = frac.corr.mean - frac.corr.mean[which(alphaS == 0)])
    
# Decision-based DB vs. VS
p1=plot.data %>% filter(model == "dbn1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, lty=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-.3, .3),  breaks=seq(-1, 1, by=0.1))+
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Individual Accuracy \n") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p1

p2=plot.data %>% filter(model == "vsn1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, lty=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-.3, .3),  breaks=seq(-1, 1, by=0.1))+
  
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p2
p = ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2, common.legend = T, legend = "right",
              labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/acctime_dbn_vsn.jpeg")

# Reward-based DB vs. VS
p1=plot.data %>% filter(model == "dbr1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, lty=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-.3, .3),  breaks=seq(-1, 1, by=0.1))+
  
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBr], " / ", alpha[VSr], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Individual Accuracy \n") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p1

p2=plot.data %>% filter(model == "vsr1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, lty=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-.3, .3),  breaks=seq(-1, 1, by=0.1))+
  
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBr], " / ", alpha[VSr], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p2
p = ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2, common.legend = T, legend = "right",
              labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/acctime_dbr_vsr.jpeg")

# Switch-rate over time
plot.data = results$switches.time %>%
  group_by(model, alphaS, ratio, max, time) %>%
  reframe(switch.frac.mean = mean(switch.frac)) %>%
  group_by(model, ratio, max, time) %>%
  mutate(delta.mean = switch.frac.mean - switch.frac.mean[which(alphaS == 0)])
    
# Decision-based DB vs. VS
p1 = plot.data %>% filter(model == "dbn1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  #geom_line(data=plot.data %>% filter(model == "m2.1" & alphaS == 0)) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Switch Rate \n") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,.6),  breaks=seq(0, 1, by=.2))+
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn],  "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p1
    
p2 = plot.data %>% filter(model == "vsn1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  #geom_line(data=plot.data %>% filter(model == "m2.1" & alphaS == 0)) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,.6),  breaks=seq(0, 1, by=.2))+
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn],  "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p2
    
p = ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2, common.legend = T, legend = "right",
              labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/switchtime_dbn_vsn.jpeg")

# Reward-based DB vs. VS
p1 = plot.data %>% filter(model == "dbr1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  #geom_line(data=plot.data %>% filter(model == "m2.1" & alphaS == 0)) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Switch Rate \n") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,.6),  breaks=seq(0, 1, by=.2))+
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBr], " / ", alpha[VSr],  "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p1
    
p2 = plot.data %>% filter(model == "vsr1.fixed") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=delta.mean, group=alphaS, col=alphaS)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1, lty=2) +
  #geom_line(data=plot.data %>% filter(model == "m2.1" & alphaS == 0)) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,.6),  breaks=seq(0, 1, by=.2))+
  scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBr], " / ", alpha[VSr],  "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)
p2
    
p = ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2, common.legend = T, legend = "right",
              labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)))
ggexport(p, width = 2800, height = 1440, 
         filename = "social/results/expectations/switchtime_dbr_vsr.jpeg")

    
```

## Models with 2 social learning parameter but only db or vs (dbndbr, vsnvsr)
```{r, expect-2alpha-rlpars, echo=TRUE}
# Get model list
models = getmodels()

# Drop versions with adaptive social learning weights
# models=lapply(models,function(x) x[!grepl(pattern = "2", models$name)] )

# Select models with two social learning parameter
models=lapply(models,function(x) x[models$name %in% c("arl.fixed", "vsnvsr1.fixed", "dbndbr1.fixed")] )

# Load ARL model fit
fit = readRDS("asocial/results/modelcomp/m4.1.fit.rds")

# Get ARL parameter estimates
draws = fit %>%
  tidy_draws() %>%
  select(names(models$free.pars.pop[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]]))
arl.pars = apply(draws, 2, mean)

# Remove fit
remove(fit)

# Set social learning weights for decision- and reward- based DB and VS
srl.pars = expand.grid( 
  "alphaDBDR" = unique(c(seq(0, .1, by=.02), seq(.1, 1, by=.1))), 
  "sigmaDBDR" = seq(0, 1, by=.1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(alphaVSDR = alphaDBDR, sigmaVSDR = sigmaDBDR)

# Merge
rl.pars = models$fixed.par[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]] %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  cbind(t(arl.pars)) %>% cbind(srl.pars)
```

```{r, expect-2alpha-convex-compute, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results='markup'}
log.txt = "social/results/expectations/log_2pars_convex.txt"
if(!file.exists(log.txt)){file.create(log.txt)}

# Add caching
if(!file.exists(paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars_convex.rds", sep = "/"))){
  
  sink(log.txt, append = T)

  # Results list
  results = list(
    rew.acc = list(),
    acc.time = list(),
    switches = list(), switches.time = list()
  )
  
  for(mod in 1:length(models$name)){

    # Get function
    f = get(models$sim[[mod]])
    
    for(parcomb in 1:nrow(rl.pars)){

      # Get rl.pars and add to sim pars
      sim.pars = c(exp.pars, env.pars, rl.pars[parcomb, ])
      
      
      # Loop over number of simulations
      for(sim in 1:nsim){
        
        if(exists("end.time")){
          print(paste("This took:", (end.time - start.time), "seconds" ))
        }
        start.time = Sys.time()
        
        prgrss = paste("Simulating from model", models$name[[mod]], 
                       ". Parameter combination", parcomb, 
                       ", simulation ", sim)
        print(prgrss)
        
        # Simulate data
        sim.data = f(sim.parameters = sim.pars)
        
        # Add sim parameters
        sim.data = sim.data %>%
          mutate(decision = decision - 1) %>%
          cbind(model=models$name[[mod]], parcomb=parcomb) %>%
          bind_cols(rl.pars[parcomb, ]) %>%
          mutate(alphaS = alphaDBDR, sigmaS=sigmaDBDR) %>%
          mutate(sim = sim) %>%
          relocate(model, parcomb, sim)
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy and rewards
        rew.acc = sim.data %>%
          # Compute individual accuracy and rewards on each trial 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, sigmaS, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>% # for each individual trial
          reframe(acc = sum(decision), 
                  rew = sum(reward)) %>%
          mutate(acc = acc / (duration + 1)) %>%
          mutate(rew = rew / (duration + 1)) %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, sigmaS, ratio, max) %>% 
          reframe(acc.mean = mean(acc), rew.mean = mean(rew)) 
        
        # Save
        results$rew.acc = append(results$rew.acc, list(rew.acc))
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy ~ time
        acc.time = sim.data %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy at each time step
          group_by(sim, model, alphaS, sigmaS, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(frac.corr = mean(decision)) 
        
        # Save
        results$acc.time = append(results$acc.time, list(acc.time))
        
        # Compute mean switch rate
        switches = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sigmaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switches = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          reframe(switches = sum(switches, na.rm=T) / duration) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sigmaS, sim, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switches.mean = mean(switches)) 
        
        # Save
        results$switches = append(results$switches, list(switches))
        
        # Compute mean switches ~ time
        switches.time = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sigmaS, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switch = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaS, sigmaS, sim, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switch.frac = sum(switch, na.rm = T) / max(player)) 
        
         # Save
        results$switches.time = append(results$switches.time, list(switches.time))
        
        # End time
        end.time = Sys.time()
        
      }
      
    }
  }
  
  results = lapply(results, function(x) bind_rows(x))
  saveRDS(results, file = 
            paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars_convex.rds", sep = "/"))
  
  sink()
  
}else{
  results = readRDS(file = paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars_convex.rds", sep = "/"))
}


```

### Plot
```{r, expect-1alpha-plot, echo=TRUE}

# List to save plots to
plot.list = list()
    
# Facet labels
max.labs = paste("Maximum Yield", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max)))
names(max.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max))

ratio.labs = paste("Yield Ratio", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio)))
names(ratio.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio))

facet.labeller = labeller(ratio=ratio.labs, max=max.labs)
    


# Individual Accuracy over time
plot.data = results$acc.time %>%
  group_by(model, alphaS, sigmaS, ratio, max, time) %>%
  reframe(frac.corr.mean = mean(frac.corr)) 
    
plot.data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=frac.corr.mean, group=model, col=model)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1) +
  #scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Individual Accuracy \n") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)




    
```




## Models with 2 social learning parameter but only both db and vs (dbnvsr, vsndbr)
```{r, expect-2alpha-rlpars, echo=TRUE}
# Get model list
models = getmodels(hierarch = FALSE)

# Drop versions with adaptive social learning weights
# models=lapply(models,function(x) x[!grepl(pattern = "2", models$name)] )

# Select models with two social learning parameter
models=lapply(models,function(x) x[models$name %in% c("arl.fixed", "dbnvsr1.fixed", "vsndbr1.fixed")] )

# Load ARL model fit
fit = readRDS("asocial/results/modelcomp/m4.1.fit.rds")

# Get ARL parameter estimates
draws = fit %>%
  tidy_draws() %>%
  select(names(models$free.pars.pop[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]]))
arl.pars = apply(draws, 2, mean)

# Remove fit
remove(fit)

# Set social learning weights for decision- and reward- based DB and VS
srl.pars = expand.grid( 
  "alphaDBD" = unique(c(seq(0, .1, by=.02), seq(.1, 1, by=.1))), 
  "alphaVSR" = unique(c(seq(0, .1, by=.02), seq(.1, 1, by=.1)))
  ) %>%
  mutate(alphaVSD = alphaDBD, alphaDBR = alphaVSR)

# Merge
rl.pars = models$fixed.par[[which(models$name %in% c("arl.fixed"))]] %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  cbind(t(arl.pars)) %>% cbind(srl.pars)
```

```{r, expect-2alpha-compute, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results='markup'}
log.txt = "social/results/expectations/log_2pars.txt"
if(!file.exists(log.txt)){file.create(log.txt)}

# Add caching
if(!file.exists(paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars.rds", sep = "/"))){
  
  sink(log.txt, append = T)

  # Results list
  results = list(
    rew.acc = list(),
    acc.time = list(),
    switches = list(), switches.time = list()
  )
  
  for(mod in 1:length(models$name)){


    # Get function
    f = get(models$sim[[mod]])
    
    for(parcomb in 1:nrow(rl.pars)){


      # Get rl.pars and add to sim pars
      sim.pars = c(exp.pars, env.pars, rl.pars[parcomb, ])
      
      
      # Loop over number of simulations
      for(sim in 1:nsim){
        
        if(exists("end.time")){
          print(paste("This took:", (end.time - start.time), "seconds" ))
        }
        start.time = Sys.time()
        
        prgrss = paste("Simulating from model", models$name[[mod]], 
                       ". Parameter combination", parcomb, 
                       ", simulation ", sim)
        print(prgrss)
        
        # Simulate data
        sim.data = f(sim.parameters = sim.pars)
        
        # Add sim parameters
        sim.data = sim.data %>%
          mutate(decision = decision - 1) %>%
          cbind(model=models$name[[mod]], parcomb=parcomb) %>%
          bind_cols(rl.pars[parcomb, ]) %>%
          mutate(sim = sim) %>%
          relocate(model, parcomb, sim)
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy and rewards
        rew.acc = sim.data %>%
          # Compute individual accuracy and rewards on each trial 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>% # for each individual trial
          reframe(acc = sum(decision), 
                  rew = sum(reward)) %>%
          mutate(acc = acc / (duration + 1)) %>%
          mutate(rew = rew / (duration + 1)) %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy 
          group_by(sim, model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, ratio, max) %>% 
          reframe(acc.mean = mean(acc), rew.mean = mean(rew)) 
        
        # Save
        results$rew.acc = append(results$rew.acc, list(rew.acc))
        
        # Compute mean individual accuracy ~ time
        acc.time = sim.data %>%
          # Compute average individual accuracy at each time step
          group_by(sim, model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(frac.corr = mean(decision)) 
        
        # Save
        results$acc.time = append(results$acc.time, list(acc.time))
        
        # Compute mean switch rate
        switches = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switches = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          reframe(switches = sum(switches, na.rm=T) / duration) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, sim, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switches.mean = mean(switches)) 
        
        # Save
        results$switches = append(results$switches, list(switches))
        
        # Compute mean switches ~ time
        switches.time = sim.data %>%
          group_by(model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, sim, session, trial, player, duration, ratio, max) %>%
          mutate(switch = ifelse(lag(decision) != decision, 1, 0)) %>%
          group_by(model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, sim, time, ratio, max) %>%
          reframe(switch.frac = sum(switch, na.rm = T) / max(player)) 
        
         # Save
        results$switches.time = append(results$switches.time, list(switches.time))
        
        # End time
        end.time = Sys.time()
        
      }
      
    }
  }
  
  results = lapply(results, function(x) bind_rows(x))
  saveRDS(results, file = 
            paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars.rds", sep = "/"))
  
  sink()
  
}else{
  results = readRDS(file = paste("social/results/expectations", "expec_2pars.rds", sep = "/"))
}


```

### Plot
```{r, expect-2alpha-plot, echo=TRUE}

# List to save plots to
plot.list = list()
    
# Facet labels
max.labs = paste("Maximum Yield", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max)))
names(max.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$max))

ratio.labs = paste("Yield Ratio", sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio)))
names(ratio.labs) = sort(unique(results$rew.acc$ratio))

facet.labeller = labeller(ratio=ratio.labs, max=max.labs)
    


# Individual Accuracy over time
plot.data = results$acc.time %>%
  group_by(model, alphaVSD, alphaVSR, alphaDBD, alphaDBR, ratio, max, time) %>%
  reframe(frac.corr.mean = mean(frac.corr)) 
    
plot.data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=frac.corr.mean, group=model, col=model)) +
  geom_line(alpha=1) +
  #scale_color_viridis(name=bquote(paste(alpha[DBn], " / ", alpha[VSn], "\n")), end = 1) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=20),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  labs(x="\n Time", y="Difference in Individual Accuracy \n") +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(3.5)), 
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_grid(ratio ~ max, labeller = facet.labeller)




    
```
